title: surfacea racemosa
intro: Surfacea racemosa, also known as the prickly poppy or prickly thistle, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Surfacea racemosa include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular herb among herbalists. Surfacea racemosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties in a way that suits their needs.
